spec.uql:
parse-xml
| scope "DescribeDBSnapshotsResponse.DescribeDBSnapshotsResult.DBSnapshots.DBSnapshot"
| project "DBSnapshotIdentifier", "DBInstanceIdentifier", "Engine", "EngineVersion", "SnapshotCreateTime", "Status"
| extend "Created At" = todatetime("SnapshotCreateTime")
| order by "Created At" desc
